Recruiting · Career Coaching · Clean Energy

Connecting talent
to the clean
energy future.

15 years placing engineers, executives, and operators at SolarCity, Tesla, Rivian, and beyond. Now helping the next wave find their place in it.

About David

I've spent 15 years inside the clean energy industry — not just recruiting for it. From the early days of residential solar at SolarCity to electric vehicles at Tesla and Rivian, to demand flexibility at Voltus and advisory work at Talisman Partners, I've been part of the teams building the infrastructure of the energy transition.

That experience changes how I recruit. I know what a grid software engineer actually does on day one. I know what an operations leader at a storage company needs beyond the job description. I can have a real conversation with a candidate about why a role matters — and a real one with a hiring manager about what they actually need versus what they think they need.

DR Consulting is my solo practice. I work with a small number of clients at a time, which means every search gets my full attention. If you're looking for a career conversation, a recruiting partnership, or a connection in the clean energy space — let's talk.

DR

What I do

Clean Energy Recruiting

Placing engineers, project developers, operators, and executives across solar, storage, EV, grid software, and sustainable infrastructure. Deep sector relationships and a 15-year track record across the full career lifecycle — from first cleantech role to C-suite placement.

Career Coaching & Transition

For professionals navigating what's next — whether you're entering clean energy for the first time, considering a move within the sector, or planning a thoughtful exit into advisory work or retirement. 15 years of market knowledge and genuine industry relationships in every conversation.

Recruiter Partnerships

Partnering with internal TA teams and external search firms on specialized roles in adjacent verticals: robotics, AI/ML, data science, hard tech, deep tech, automation, and infrastructure. I bring sector depth; you bring the network. Together, we close faster and better.

Who I work with

  • Job seekers in clean energy & climate tech — Mid-career professionals and senior leaders navigating a specialized, relationship-driven industry.
  • Late-career professionals — Executives and senior contributors planning a thoughtful transition to advisory, board work, or retirement.
  • Recruiters, internal and external — Talent professionals in adjacent verticals who need a specialist partner for cross-functional or hard-to-fill searches.
  • University & alumni career offices — Academic advisors connecting students and alumni with clean energy and climate tech opportunities.

Ready to connect?

Every good placement starts with a conversation. Book 30 minutes.
